question: Assuming today is Friday of the current week, what is the approximate average energy usage for the entire week?

options.A: Unable to calculate / data for the full week is not available
options.B: The average is exactly 40 kWh because the bars look similar
options.C: About 42 kWh, using only days with non-zero values
options.D: About 30 kWh, computed from all seven bars

explanation: The chart only shows measured values for the first part of the week; the remaining days are effectively missing, but are drawn as zero-height bars. Computing an average across all seven days (including those zeros) assumes the missing days truly had zero values, which is not supported by the data. Therefore the weekly average cannot be reliably calculated.
